element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player vs AI opponent in single match
Strategic offensive/defensive play selection before each down
Receiver positioning and catch control during passing plays
Spatial reorientation without disorienting instant POV reversal
Tactical review and play analysis from multiple angles
Team roster management and authentic roster selection
Unlocked/accessible without cheat codes, enabling championship play

typical_relief_triggers: Screen rotation during punts preventing disorientation
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based play cadence with strategic breaks between downs; real-time execution during active plays; designed for methodical decision-making balanced against time pressure

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic play-calling and offensive/defensive mechanics with tutorial-like match structure
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive complexity through multiple match scenarios and varied opponent strategies
difficulty_curve.late_game: Championship-level play against higher AI difficulty; Super Bowl matchups with enhanced opponent competency
notable_spikes: First opponent with advanced defensive bluff plays
Super Bowl tier teams with aggressive play-calling patterns

notable_level_patterns.description: Linear progression through one complete NFL game (4 quarters) with turn-based down sequences, screen rotation on special teams plays to maintain player orientation
Sequential tournament-style matches leading toward Super Bowl, increasing opponent difficulty and strategic complexity at each stage
Strategic pause-and-select loop for play-calling before execution, breaking pacing into decision phase and execution phase
